questions.question: What Vite build configuration enables building a Vue component library as a distributable package?
options: Library mode via vite.config.ts build.lib settings

questions.question: Why should a shared component library use CSS custom properties for theming?
options: CSS variables have better browser support than Sass variables
Consumers can override tokens at the app level without touching library code
It reduces the CSS bundle size significantly
Vue requires CSS variables for scoped style inheritance

questions.question: What package.json setting enables bundlers to remove unused components from a shared library?
